from dataclasses import dataclass, field

@dataclass
class TimerTransaction:
    scenario_id: str
    op: str
    payload: dict = field(default_factory=dict)
    expect: dict = field(default_factory=dict)
    goal_id: str = ''

from agents import TimerDriver, TimerMonitor
from coverage import TimerCoverage
from scoreboard import TimerScoreboard

class TimerEnv:
    def __init__(self, dut=None, root='.'):
        self.driver = TimerDriver(dut)
        self.monitor = TimerMonitor(dut)
        self.scoreboard = TimerScoreboard(root)
        self.coverage = TimerCoverage(root)

    async def run_transaction(self, tr):
        driven = await self.driver.drive(tr)
        observed = await self.monitor.observe(driven)
        self.coverage.sample(tr.scenario_id, [tr.goal_id])
        return self.scoreboard.check(tr.scenario_id, self.monitor.cycle, driven.payload, observed, [tr.goal_id], tr.goal_id)

    def close(self):
        self.scoreboard.final_check()
        self.coverage.write()
